notes: Switched update metadata and package downloads to refs/heads/main to avoid stale GitHub raw cache.
changelog: v0.1.8 - Switched update metadata and package downloads to refs/heads/main to avoid stale GitHub raw cache.
v0.1.7 - Fixed automatic updater download path and added WGA-update.log diagnostics.
v0.1.6 - Added automatic installer menu with checkboxes and one-click sequential installation.
v0.1.5 - Added update history button and popup notification for available updates.
v0.1.4 - Added automatic update installer with download, file replacement, and restart.
v0.1.3 - Added Bulgarian update messages and clearer GitHub raw diagnostics.
v0.1.2 - Added language status panel, Adobe Reader version check, resource manager, icon, and UI fixes.
